  /v0/markets:
    get:
      operationId: listMarkets
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: List markets
      description: >
        Returns markets with optional filtering by status and creator. When status is
        provided, results are backed by the status-specific listing path used by the
        live handler.
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: status
          required: false
          description: >
            Filter by market status. Accepted values are active, closed, resolved, and all
            (or omitted for all markets).
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [active, closed, resolved, all]
        - in: query
          name: limit
          required: false
          description: Maximum number of markets to return. Malformed, non-positive, or out-of-range values fall back to the live default of 50.
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: offset
          required: false
          description: Number of markets to skip before collecting results. Malformed or negative values fall back to 0.
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: created_by
          required: false
          description: Only include markets created by the supplied username.
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Markets returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ListMarketsResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid or unsupported status filter.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while listing markets.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR
    post:
      operationId: createMarket
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Create a market
      description: Creates a new prediction market for the authenticated user.
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateMarketRequest'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Market created successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/MarketResponse'
        '400':
          description: Request decoding failed, validation failed, or the creator lacks funds.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
                validationFailed:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: VALIDATION_FAILED
                insufficientBalance:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE
        '401':
          description: Authentication is required.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authenticationRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
        '403':
          description: Password change required before creating markets.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                passwordChangeRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED
        '404':
          description: Authenticated user record could not be loaded.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                notFound:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: NOT_FOUND
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error during market creation.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/markets/search:
    get:
      operationId: searchMarkets
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Search markets
      description: >
        Searches markets by question title with optional status filtering. Supports both
        "query" and legacy "q" parameters.
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: query
          required: false
          description: Search query (preferred parameter name).
          schema:
            type: string
        - in: query
          name: q
          required: false
          description: Legacy search query parameter (used if "query" is not provided).
          schema:
            type: string
        - in: query
          name: status
          required: false
          description: Filter by market status; same accepted values as /v0/markets.
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [active, closed, resolved, all]
        - in: query
          name: limit
          required: false
          description: Maximum number of primary results to return. Malformed, non-positive, or out-of-range values fall back to the live default of 20.
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: offset
          required: false
          description: Number of primary results to skip before collecting. Malformed or negative values fall back to 0.
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Search completed successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SearchResponse'
        '400':
          description: Missing query parameter or invalid status.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error during search.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/markets/{id}/resolve:
    post:
      operationId: resolveMarket
      tags: [Markets]
      summary: Resolve a market
      description: Sets the final outcome for a market once it has concluded.
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          description: Numeric identifier of the market to resolve.
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ResolveMarketRequest'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Market resolved successfully; no content is returned.
        '400':
          description: Invalid request body or validation failure in the resolution payload.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
                validationFailed:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: VALIDATION_FAILED
        '401':
          description: Authentication is required.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authenticationRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
        '403':
          description: Password change requirements or creator authorization block resolution.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                passwordChangeRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED
                authorizationDenied:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHORIZATION_DENIED
        '404':
          description: Market or authenticated user record not found.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                notFound:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: NOT_FOUND
        '409':
          description: Market is already resolved or otherwise in an invalid state for resolution.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                validationFailed:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: VALIDATION_FAILED
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error during resolution.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: marketId
          required: true
          description: Market identifier.
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Position returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserPositionEnvelopeResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid market ID.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '401':
          description: Authentication failed.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '403':
          description: Password change is required before this route can be used.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '404':
          description: Market or user not found.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while fetching user position.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'

  /v0/usercredit/{username}:
    get:
      operationId: getUserCredit
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get user credit
      description: Returns the user's available credit limit, treating missing users as max debt.
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: username
          required: true
          description: Username to evaluate for credit availability.
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Credit calculated successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserCreditResponse'
        '400':
          description: Username missing or invalid.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '500':
          description: Failed to calculate user credit.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'

  /v0/admin/createuser:
    post:
      operationId: createAdminUser
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Create a new user (admin)
      description: >
        Admin-only endpoint that creates a new REGULAR user with a generated password.
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/AdminCreateUserRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: User created successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AdminCreateUserResponse'
        '400':
          description: Request decoding failed or the supplied username/derived fields failed validation.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
                validationFailed:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: VALIDATION_FAILED
        '401':
          description: Authentication is required.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authenticationRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
        '403':
          description: Admin privileges or password rotation requirements block the request.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authorizationDenied:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHORIZATION_DENIED
                passwordChangeRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while creating the user.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/portfolio/{username}:
    get:
      operationId: getUserPortfolio
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get user portfolio
      description: Returns the markets and share counts for a user's portfolio. Unknown users currently resolve to the same empty portfolio shape as users with no recorded bets.
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: username
          required: true
          description: Username whose portfolio should be returned.
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Portfolio returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PortfolioResponse'
        '400':
          description: Username missing or invalid.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while fetching portfolio.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'

  /v0/users/{username}/financial:
    get:
      operationId: getUserFinancialSnapshot
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get user financial snapshot
      description: Returns a map of financial metrics (e.g., balances and exposures) by key.
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: username
          required: true
          description: Username whose financial snapshot is requested.
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Financial snapshot returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserFinancialResponse'
        '400':
          description: Username missing or invalid.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '404':
          description: User not found.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
        '500':
          description: Failed to generate financial snapshot.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'

  /v0/stats:
    get:
      operationId: getPlatformStats
      tags: [Metrics]
      summary: Get platform stats
      description: Returns aggregate stats and the current economics configuration. This route is public in the current backend implementation.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Stats returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/StatsEnvelopeResponse'
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while computing stats.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/system/metrics:
    get:
      operationId: getSystemMetrics
      tags: [Metrics]
      summary: Get system metrics
      description: Computes money creation/utilization metrics for auditing the economy. This route is public in the current backend implementation.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Metrics returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SystemMetricsEnvelopeResponse'
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while computing metrics.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/global/leaderboard:
    get:
      operationId: getGlobalLeaderboard
      tags: [Metrics]
      summary: Get global leaderboard
      description: Returns a leaderboard ranking users by profitability across all markets. This route is public in the current backend implementation.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Global leaderboard returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/GlobalLeaderboardEnvelopeResponse'
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while computing global leaderboard.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

  /v0/content/home:
    get:
      operationId: getHomepageContent
      tags: [Content]
      summary: Get public homepage content
      description: Retrieves CMS-configured homepage content.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Homepage content returned successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/HomeContentEnvelopeResponse'
        '404':
          description: Homepage content not found.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                notFound:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: NOT_FOUND

  /v0/admin/content/home:
    put:
      operationId: updateHomepageContent
      tags: [Content]
      summary: Update homepage content
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/HomeContentUpdateRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Homepage content updated successfully.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/HomeContentUpdateEnvelopeResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid request body or update failure.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                invalidRequest:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INVALID_REQUEST
                validationFailed:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: VALIDATION_FAILED
        '401':
          description: Authentication is required.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authenticationRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
        '403':
          description: Admin privileges or password rotation requirements block the request.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                authorizationDenied:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: AUTHORIZATION_DENIED
                passwordChangeRequired:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED
        '500':
          description: Unexpected server error while updating content.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:
                internalError:
                  value:
                    ok: false
                    reason: INTERNAL_ERROR

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
      required: [error]

openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: SocialPredict API
  version: 0.1.0
  description: >
    HTTP contract for the SocialPredict backend service. This spec is generated
    from the Go handlers and DTOs under backend/server and backend/handlers.
    Routes wrapped by the shared security middleware can return a shared
    transport-level `429 text/plain` response before reaching handler-specific
    JSON envelope logic when the rate limit is exceeded. This middleware
    exception applies across protected routes even when a path omits a repeated
    path-level `429` entry.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080
    description: Local dev server
tags:
  - name: Auth
    description: Authentication and session management.
  - name: Config
    description: Health and configuration endpoints.
  - name: Markets
    description: Market creation, listing, search, and resolution.
  - name: Bets
    description: Placing and selling bets.
  - name: Users
    description: Public and private user profile and financial data.
  - name: Metrics
    description: Platform-wide metrics and leaderboards.
  - name: Content
    description: CMS-powered homepage content.

paths:
  /health:
    get:
      operationId: getHealth
      tags: [Config]
      summary: Backend health check
      description: Simple liveness probe that returns "ok" when the backend is running.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Backend is healthy.
          content:
            text/plain:
              schema:
                type: string
                example: ok

  /openapi.yaml:
    get:
      operationId: getOpenAPISpec
      tags: [Config]
      summary: Get the live OpenAPI document
      description: Returns the OpenAPI source served directly by the backend.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OpenAPI document returned successfully.
          content:
            application/yaml:
              schema:
                type: string

  /swagger:
    get:
      operationId: redirectSwaggerUI
      tags: [Config]
      summary: Redirect to Swagger UI
      description: Redirects clients to the embedded Swagger UI under `/swagger/`.
      responses:
        '301':
          description: Redirect to `/swagger/`.
          headers:
            Location:
              description: Redirect target for the Swagger UI.
              schema:
                type: string

  /swagger/:
    get:
      operationId: getSwaggerUI
      tags: [Config]
      summary: Serve Swagger UI
      description: Returns the embedded Swagger UI application for browsing the live OpenAPI document.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Swagger UI returned successfully.
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string

  /v0/login:
    post:
      operationId: loginUser
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Authenticate user
      description: >
        Validates username and password and returns a JWT bearer token for subsequent
        authenticated requests. Users flagged for password rotation still receive the
        normal token plus `mustChangePassword: true`; server-side enforcement limits
        what they can do with it.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginRequest'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Login successful.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid JSON payload or validation failure.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReasonResponse'
              examples:

item.text: I’m editing the contract now. The changes are narrowly scoped to what runtime validation proved: document middleware `429`s where the shared wrappers actually apply, widen the live OpenAPI document schema, and remove stale drift prose from `API-ISSUES.md`.
`API-ISSUES.md` is being collapsed back to what it should be: a short list of actual deferred product/API decisions, not a stale scratchpad of already-fixed sweep findings.
The contract and issue-file edits are in place. I’m validating the exact slices now before rerunning kin-openapi and the runtime probe.

          description: Invalid request body or update failure.

        '403':

              examples:
                authorizationDenied:
                  value:

# Backend API Follow-Ups

This file tracks the remaining API-shaping decisions after Waves 1-4.

Source of truth order for the current backend remains:

1. `backend/server/server.go`
2. routed handlers and DTOs under `backend/handlers/**`
3. `backend/docs/openapi.yaml`
4. this file

This document is intentionally narrow. It should reflect the code that exists
today, not earlier uncertainty and not aspirational redesign work that has not
been scheduled.

## Validated Baseline (2026-04-23)

- `backend/server/server.go` remains the route inventory source of truth, and
  `backend/docs/openapi.yaml` is aligned with the live docs/config surface,
  public-versus-protected routes, shared failure-reason vocabulary, and the
  middleware-level `429 text/plain` responses emitted by rate limiting.
- The checked-in OpenAPI document parses and validates, the embedded OpenAPI
  and Swagger UI assets match the served files, and the backend serves the live
  contract from `/openapi.yaml` plus the embedded UI from `/swagger/`.
- The final local runtime sweep was executed against a non-Docker backend using
  the current implementation as the source of truth. Future contract work
  should update code and `backend/docs/openapi.yaml` first, then revise this
  file only if a real deferred API decision remains.

## Deferred Decisions

Only the following API decisions remain deferred at this stage.

### 1. Limited-Scope Token Login Redesign

Current implementation:

- `POST /v0/login` returns a normal bearer token plus `mustChangePassword`.
- Protected handlers typically enforce the password-change gate through
  `auth.ValidateUserAndEnforcePasswordChangeGetUser(...)` or
  `AuthService.CurrentUser(...)`.
- `POST /v0/changepassword` still accepts an authenticated request using the
  current token-validation path.
- Admin-only routes use `AuthService.RequireAdmin(...)`, which enforces the
  same password-change gate before the admin role check.

Why it remains deferred:

- The backend and OpenAPI now describe the current contract consistently enough
  to avoid treating this as unresolved implementation drift.
- The remaining question is product/security design: whether first-login users
  should receive a limited-scope or short-lived token instead of the normal
  bearer token.

Decision for this wave:

- Keep the existing login contract and its current OpenAPI shape.
- Do not redesign token issuance in this task.

### 2. Public Route Reorganization

Current implementation:

- `backend/server/server.go` makes the existing public and protected routes
  explicit.
- The OpenAPI document reflects the current monolith route layout rather than a
  future CRUD-style reorganization.
- Legacy and service-shaped paths still coexist where the code already exposes
  them.

Why it remains deferred:

- The remaining work is a route-design decision, not a documentation
  reconstruction problem.
- Reorganizing public resource paths would be broader than this task and would
  require coordinated code, OpenAPI, and client updates.

Decision for this wave:

- Keep documenting the live route structure exactly as implemented.
- Do not revive the earlier CRUD rewrite proposal in this file.

### 3. Bets-To-Trades Rename

Current implementation:

- The API still uses bets terminology in both routes and tags, including
  `/v0/markets/bets/{marketId}`, `/v0/bet`, `/v0/sell`, and the related
  OpenAPI schema/tag naming.

Why it remains deferred:

- The naming change is still a cross-cutting rename with client and
  documentation impact.
- Nothing in the current code state narrows that work beyond a future rename
  decision.

Decision for this wave:

- Keep the existing bets terminology as the canonical current contract.
- Do not partially rename routes, tags, or schemas in this task.

## Non-Goals For This File

The following ideas were discussed historically but are not active issues for
this task:

- forcing a universal `ok/result/reason` response envelope across the API
- removing the current plaintext middleware rate-limit responses
- rewriting the API into a new CRUD path taxonomy
- bundling unrelated implementation changes into this follow-up file

If future work changes the backend or OpenAPI contract, update that code/spec
first and then revise this file to match the new implementation.

item.text:
Completed the final API sweep. The target repo now has the contract/docs reconciliation in [openapi.yaml](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/docs/openapi.yaml) and [API-ISSUES.md](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/docs/API-ISSUES.md), plus the remaining runtime fix in [server.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/server/server.go) with regression coverage in [server_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/server/server_test.go). Verifier sign-off is approved.

- `task_uid`: `019dae73-3002-782c-bdeb-569256ff5db8`
- `task_id`: `API-009`
- `status`: `completed`
- `files_changed`: [openapi.yaml](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/docs/openapi.yaml), [API-ISSUES.md](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/docs/API-ISSUES.md), [server.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/server/server.go), [server_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/server/server_test.go)
- `checks_run`: `gofmt -w backend/server/server.go backend/server/server_test.go`; focused `go test` for OpenAPI/embed checks in `backend/.`; focused `go test ./server`; kin-openapi conformance; local non-Docker backend runtime start; served `/openapi.yaml` byte-match check; scoped Schemathesis v4.15.2 runtime conformance against 16 public/docs operation IDs (`16 passed`); `git diff --check`; `go vet ./server`; architecture boundary checks
- `follow_ups`: control-repo Schemathesis wrapper still uses obsolete `--base-url` instead of `--url`; Schemathesis still emits non-fatal schema-validation-mismatch warnings on 8 read-only endpoints even though all generated cases passed

Assumptions: `/swagger` redirect evidence was verified with direct runtime `GET` probes rather than Schemathesis, because the installed CLI treats disabled redirect following as a transport error rather than a passing documented `301`.
